positive: A vibrant, highly detailed geometric pattern featuring abstract celestial bodies—stylized crescent moons, radiating stars, and orbiting planetary rings. The composition should be perfectly centered and symmetrical, designed to wrap around apparel. The color palette must be deep indigo, cosmic navy, shimmering gold, and ethereal cyan. Use a linocut woodblock print style mixed with modern sacred geometry influences. The overall mood is mystical and expansive, featuring clean, bold silhouettes with high contrast for maximum print readability. No photographic realism, maintain a stylized vector aesthetic.
